data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplification of user decisions to enhance content selection.
data.technical_spec: Limit primary interactions to a few choices on the homepage.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design for easy and quick interactions to reduce user friction.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons and controls for play/pause.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creating an aesthetically pleasing interface to improve usability.
data.technical_spec: Clean, modern UI with high-quality visuals and consistent design language.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Optimizing for peaks and ends of user experiences.
data.technical_spec: Engaging introductions to new content and personalized recommendations.

data.title: Jakob’s Law of Internet User Experience
data.description: Leveraging familiar design patterns for smoother navigation and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Standardized menu placement and intuitive navigation paths.
